dublinCore.dc:title: 116 HRES 1037 EH: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives and ranking a certain Member on a certain standing committee of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives and ranking a certain Member on a certain standing committee of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That the following named Members be, and are hereby, elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Palmer, to rank immediately before Mr. Cloud.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Science, Space, and Technology:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Garcia of California, Mr. Tiffany.

section.text: That the following named Member be, and is hereby, ranked as follows on the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Comer, to rank before Mr. Jordan.
